live_mode.description: This field will be true if this object exists in the live environment or false if it exists in the test environment.

internal_account_id.description: The ID of the Internal Account for the incoming payment detail. This is always present.

virtual_account_id.description: If the incoming payment detail is in a virtual account, the ID of the Virtual Account.

virtual_account.description: If the incoming payment detail is in a virtual account, the serialized virtual account object.

transaction_line_item_id.description: The ID of the reconciled Transaction Line Item or `null`.

transaction_id.description: The ID of the reconciled Transaction or `null`.

ledger_transaction_id.description: The ID of the ledger transaction linked to the incoming payment detail or `null`.

data.description: The raw data from the payment pre-notification file that we get from the bank.

amount.description: Value in specified currency's smallest unit. e.g. $10 would be represented as 1000.

currency.description: The currency of the incoming payment detail.

status.description: The current status of the incoming payment order. One of `pending`, `completed`, or `returned`.

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.

as_of_date.description: The date on which the corresponding transaction will occur.

vendor_id.description: The identifier of the vendor bank.

originating_routing_number.description: The routing number of the originating account for the incoming payment detail.

originating_routing_number_type.description: The type of the originating routing number for the incoming payment detail.

originating_account_number.description: The account number of the originating account for the incoming payment detail.

originating_account_number_safe.description: The last 4 digits of the originating account_number for the incoming payment detail.

originating_account_number_type.description: The type of the originating account number for the incoming payment detail.

originating_party_name.description: The name of the originating party for the incoming payment detail.

originating_party_address.description: The address of the originating party for the incoming payment detail, or `null`.

originating_party_vendor_identifier.description: The vendor-assigned identifier for the originating party of the incoming payment detail, or `null`.

receiving_account_number.description: The account number of the receiving account for the incoming payment detail, or `null`.

receiving_account_number_safe.description: The last 4 digits of the receiving account number for the incoming payment detail, or `null`.

subtype.description: An additional layer of classification for the type of incoming payment detail. For example, a `type` of `stablecoin` may have a `subtype` of `ethereum` or `solana`.
